parameters.query:
INSERT INTO "NF_ServiceMetadata" (
  "codigo", "contas", "boletos", "nota", "cliente", "status",
  "vendedor", "chave", "numeronfs", "notarecibo", "vinculooscomnfs", 
  "runned", "created_at", "updated_at"
) VALUES {{ range($json.extracted) }}
(
  '{{ $item.codigo }}',
  '{{ $item.contas }}',
  '{{ $item.boletos }}',
  '{{ $item.nota }}',
  '{{ $item.cliente }}',
  '{{ $item.status }}',
  '{{ $item.vendedor }}',
  '{{ $item.chave }}',
  '{{ $item.numeronfs }}',
  '{{ $item.notarecibo }}',
  '{{ $item.vinculooscomnfs }}',
  '{{ $item.runned }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
){{ if $index < ($json.extracted.length - 1) }},{{ /if }}
{{ /range }}
ON CONFLICT ("codigo")
DO UPDATE SET
  "contas" = EXCLUDED."contas",
  "boletos" = EXCLUDED."boletos",
  "nota" = EXCLUDED."nota",
  "cliente" = EXCLUDED."cliente",
  "status" = EXCLUDED."status",
  "vendedor" = EXCLUDED."vendedor",
  "chave" = EXCLUDED."chave",
  "numeronfs" = EXCLUDED."numeronfs",
  "notarecibo" = EXCLUDED."notarecibo",
  "vinculooscomnfs" = EXCLUDED."vinculooscomnfs",
  "runned" = EXCLUDED."runned",
  "updated_at" = NOW()
WHERE (
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."contas" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."contas" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."boletos" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."boletos" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."nota" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."nota" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."cliente" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."cliente" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."status" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."status" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."vendedor" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."vendedor" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."chave" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."chave" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."numeronfs" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."numeronfs" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."notarecibo" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."notarecibo" OR
  "NF_ServiceMetadata"."vinculooscomnfs" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."vinculooscomnfs"
);
